header.subtitulo: Takes less than 2 minutes. Your data is handled confidentially.

form.emailAjuda: We'll use your e-mail only to talk about this application.
form.curriculoEnviar: Drag the PDF here or click to upload

captcha.label: Anti-robot check
captcha.instrucao: Type the characters shown in the image.

validacao.captchaInvalido: The code doesn't match. Try again.
validacao.curriculoObrigatorio: Attach your resume as a PDF.
validacao.curriculoFormato: The resume must be a PDF file.
validacao.curriculoTamanho: The file is larger than {{max}} MB.

logado.subtitulo: For {{vaga}}. Check your resume and apply.

sucesso.descricao: We received your application for {{vaga}}. You'll be notified by e-mail about the next steps.
sucesso.emailAviso: We sent a temporary password to your e-mail. Use it to access your account and follow your application.

segunda.subtitulo: Answer the questions below so we can move your process forward.
segunda.saudacao: Hi, {{nome}}. Answer with as much detail as possible. Your answers will be reviewed for the next stage.
segunda.captchaAviso: Complete the anti-robot check to enable submission.
segunda.sucessoDescricao: We received your answers. Our team will review them and notify you by e-mail about the next steps.
